---
format:
  html:
    grid:
      margin-width: 0px
---

# Course Schedule {.unnumbered}

```{=html}
<style>
/* Palette: cream #F0EBE3 · teal #8FBFCA · lavender #9B8EC7 */

/* ── Hero Banner ── */
.schedule-hero {
  background: #0f172a;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 36px 32px 28px;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}
.schedule-hero h2 {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #8FBFCA !important;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #8FBFCA !important;
}
.schedule-hero p {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #F0EBE3 !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #F0EBE3 !important;
  margin: 0 0 22px;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
.hero-pills { display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.hero-pill {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 500;
  border: 1px solid rgba(155,142,199,0.4);
  color: #F0EBE3 !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #F0EBE3 !important;
  background: rgba(155,142,199,0.15);
}

/* ── Table wrapper ── */
.sched-wrap {
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.sched-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: 0.91rem;
}

/* ── Column header row ── */
.sched-table thead tr {
  background: #0f172a !important;
}
.sched-table thead th {
  padding: 13px 16px;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: #F0EBE3 !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #F0EBE3 !important;
}

/* ── Section divider rows — uniform lavender across all parts ── */
.sec-label {
  background: #9B8EC7 !important;
}
.sec-label td {
  padding: 9px 16px !important;
  font-weight: 700 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  font-size: 0.76rem !important;
  color: #1e293b !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #1e293b !important;
  background: #9B8EC7 !important;
}

/* ── Data rows ── */
.row-sql, .row-pbi, .row-r, .row-ai { background: #fff; }
.row-sql:hover, .row-pbi:hover,
.row-r:hover,   .row-ai:hover {
  background: #f5f2f9;
}
.row-break { background: #faf9f7 !important; }
.row-break td { color: #6b7280 !important; font-style: italic; font-size: 0.87rem; text-align: center; }

.sched-table td {
  padding: 11px 16px !important;
  vertical-align: middle !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9 !important;
  transition: background 0.12s;
  color: #1e293b !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #1e293b !important;
}

/* ── Week badge ── */
.wk-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  width: 30px; height: 30px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #fff !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #fff !important;
  background: #9B8EC7;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── Topic title ── */
.topic-title {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #1e293b !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #1e293b !important;
  display: block;
}

/* ── Link buttons ── */
.btn-link {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  margin: 2px 0;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background 0.12s;
}
.btn-slides {
  background: #eef3f7;
  color: #2c6e8a !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #2c6e8a !important;
  border: 1px solid #8FBFCA;
}
.btn-slides:hover { background: #d8edf4; }
.btn-quiz {
  background: #f4f2f9;
  color: #5c4d8a !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #5c4d8a !important;
  border: 1px solid #9B8EC7;
}
.btn-quiz:hover { background: #e9e5f5; }

/* ── Notes tag ── */
.note-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #faf9f7;
  color: #6b7280 !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #6b7280 !important;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 2px 8px;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* ── Extend content into right margin column (no TOC on this page) ── */
@media (min-width: 992px) {
  #quarto-margin-sidebar { display: none !important; }
  main#quarto-document-content {
    grid-column: body-content-start / page-end !important;
  }
}

/* ── Info strip ── */
.info-strip {
  display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 24px;
}
.info-card {
  flex: 1; min-width: 200px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 16px 18px;
  font-size: 0.87rem;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  background: #fff;
  color: #334155 !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #334155 !important;
}
.info-card strong {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #1e293b !important;
  -webkit-text-fill-color: #1e293b !important;
}
</style>

<div class="schedule-hero">
  <h2>📅 ETF2121 / ETF5921 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Semester Schedule</h2>
  <p>This page outlines the weekly topics, readings, and assessments for the semester. The schedule is subject to updates — check back regularly. In the event of any discrepancy between this page and the official course handbook or exam timetable, the official sources take precedence.</p>
  <div class="hero-pills">
    <span class="hero-pill">🗄️ SQL · Weeks 1–3</span>
    <span class="hero-pill">📊 Power BI · Weeks 4–5</span>
    <span class="hero-pill">📈 Statistical Modelling in R · Weeks 6–11</span>
    <span class="hero-pill">🤖 AI &amp; Revision · Week 12</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="sched-wrap">
<table class="sched-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="width:52px">Week</th>
      <th style="width:110px">Date</th>
      <th>Topic</th>
      <th style="width:90px">Slides</th>
      <th style="width:80px">Quiz</th>
      <th style="width:120px">Notes</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>

    <!-- SQL Section -->
    <tr class="sec-label sec-sql">
      <td colspan="6">🗄️ &nbsp;Part 1: Database Query Language (SQL)</td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-sql">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-sql">1</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Jul 23</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Introduction to Databases &amp; SQL</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 1</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-sql">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-sql">2</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Jul 30</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Summarising Data with SQL</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 2</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-sql">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-sql">3</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Aug 6</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Combining Tables &amp; Advanced Queries</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 3</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Power BI Section -->
    <tr class="sec-label sec-pbi">
      <td colspan="6">📊 &nbsp;Part 2: Data Visualisation with Power BI</td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-pbi">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-pbi">4</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Aug 13</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Getting Started with Power BI</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 4</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-pbi">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-pbi">5</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Aug 20</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Building Dashboards</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 5</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Statistical Modelling Section -->
    <tr class="sec-label sec-r">
      <td colspan="6">📈 &nbsp;Part 3: Statistical Modelling with R</td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-r">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-r">6</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Aug 27</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Introduction to R &amp; Exploratory Data Analysis</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 6</a></td>
      <td><span class="note-tag">⚠️ Break follows</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-break">
      <td colspan="6" style="text-align:center; padding: 10px 16px;">
        ☀️ &nbsp;<strong>Mid-Semester Break</strong> &nbsp;—&nbsp; No classes (Aug 28 – Sep 8)
      </td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-r">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-r">7</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Sep 9</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Linear Regression</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 7</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-r">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-r">8</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Sep 16</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Logistic Regression</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 8</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-r">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-r">9</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Sep 23</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Regression Trees</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 9</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-r">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-r">10</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Sep 30</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">K-Nearest Neighbour (KNN)</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 10</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-r">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-r">11</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Oct 7</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Clustering</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_quiz" class="btn-link btn-quiz">Quiz 11</a></td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>

    <!-- Wrap-up Section -->
    <tr class="sec-label sec-ai">
      <td colspan="6">🤖 &nbsp;Part 4: Revision &amp; The Future of Data Analytics</td>
    </tr>
    <tr class="row-ai">
      <td><span class="wk-badge wk-ai">12</span></td>
      <td>Tue, Oct 14</td>
      <td><span class="topic-title">Revision &amp; AI in Data Analytics</span></td>
      <td><a href="link_to_slides" class="btn-link btn-slides">Slides</a></td>
      <td></td>
      <td><span class="note-tag">📌 Last week</span></td>
    </tr>

  </tbody>
</table>
</div>

<div class="info-strip">
  <div class="info-card card-break">
    <strong>☀️ Mid-Semester Break</strong>
    No classes from <strong>Aug 28 to Sep 8</strong>. Teaching resumes Week 7 on Tuesday, Sep 9.
  </div>
  <div class="info-card card-tools">
    <strong>🛠️ Software You Will Need</strong>
    All tools are free. <strong>DB Browser for SQLite</strong> (SQL) · <strong>Power BI Desktop</strong> (Power BI) · <strong>R + RStudio</strong> (Statistical Modelling)
  </div>
</div>
```
